comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
## Yardstick
Use `full_database_cold_load` at `total_records=10,000` (social_media profile).

## Python baseline (fresh run, 2026-02-23)
- counts: users=163, posts=1,630, comments=8,207
- full_database_cold_load: **3354.440 ms**
- single_table_cold_load (context only): 51.253 ms

## Rust baseline
Blocked: Rust backend not importable via PyO3 (no `virtuus._rust`). `maturin develop --release` fails with compile errors in `rust/src/python.rs` (PyO3 API changes / borrow issues). Tracking fix in bug: virt-1abdce.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Done: captured 10k Rust baseline and recorded alongside Python. Next: close task. Blockers: none.
